summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ViralIQ payment flow and core functionality. Backend APIs mostly functional (87.5% success rate), frontend payment flow works correctly with Stripe integration. Key issues: LLM viral_score validation error and usage limits not properly enforced.

critical_bugs.issue: Pydantic validation error - viral_score expects integer but LLM returns float (e.g., 8.5)
critical_bugs.impact: Causes 500 errors intermittently during idea generation

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: 500 Internal Server Error due to viral_score float validation
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Retry generation or fix viral_score to accept floats

logic_bugs.issue: Free tier users can generate more than 3 ideas per week
logic_bugs.impact: Business logic violation - unlimited access for free users

integration_issues.issue: Some generations fail to display ideas due to backend 500 errors

passed_tests: Pricing page displays all 3 tiers correctly
Upgrade button redirects to Stripe checkout

high_priority: Fix usage limits enforcement - free tier users should be blocked after 3 generations per week
Fix viral_score validation in VideoIdea model to accept float values or ensure LLM returns integers
medium_priority: Improve error handling for LLM response parsing
Add better user feedback when usage limits are reached
